loginForm.totpStepPrompt: Step 2: enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
loginForm.noAccount: Don't have an account? Ask your administrator for an account.
loginForm.afterPasswordReset: Your password was updated. You can sign in with your new password.
loginForm.errorRoleNotAllowed: Your role does not grant access to the application yet. Please contact an administrator.

errors.generic: We could not sign you in. Please try again in a moment.
errors.invalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Check your details or use “Forgot password?”.
errors.emailInvalid: Enter a valid email address (for example you@example.com).
errors.invalidTotp: Incorrect or expired code. Check your authenticator app and try again.
errors.totpMisconfigured: Two-factor authentication is not set up correctly on this account. Contact an administrator.
errors.checkFields: Some fields are invalid. Check your email and password, then try again.
